$comment: Mario's watchlist. Edit this file, git push, deploy = updated on site. Each item: symbol (Yahoo format), optional note (<120 chars).

items.note: Tech beta. Reaction to rates matters more than earnings.
Core bullion exposure. Long while real yields hold.

Small caps. Leading indicator for risk appetite.
Long bonds. Watch the 20y for rates reversal.
